package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests: Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule097NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule097NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule097NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario097Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule097NegativeService, input Rule097NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
